title: ZEEWIZZ2 PACK !BIG SIZE! 9.8 x 9.8 x 11.5 cms Wax Oil Burner White - Star Pattern, Ceramic Aroma Burners Warmer Aromatherapy Holder Candle Scented Diffuser Home wax burner.
features: ORNATE BURNERS - "2 PACK" The leaves & white Ceramic oil burners are a gorgeous addition to any home. light a tea light and relax in the ambience of your home filled with relaxing aromas.amazing nocturnal effect, beautiful and bright enough.
TEA LIGHT SPOON - Easy place in and out put, no more worry your finger will be hurt by the candle fire; Big mouth design effectively extends the burning time of essential oil.

OILS OR WAX - Whether you’re a lover of sweeter scents or prefer something more natural, the ceramic oil burners can be used for both oil and wax scents. pleasant and clean aromas spread from the oil diffuser, diffuse Slowly and Time Lasting.
MULTIPLE USES - Ideal for home, such as living room, bedroom and for party time, or for office, SPA, Yoga meditation. With its elegant vase shape, it’s also a good choice to be an ornament.

Excellent Decoration - Through the hollowed-out leaf hole casts the warm candlelight throughout your bedroom, calm down your mind and make you relax. Sweet fragrance help you fall asleep. have a good night!
description: Product description ZEEWIZZ !BIG SIZE! 9.8 x 9.8 x 11.5 cms Wax Melt Essential Oil Burner White - Star Pattern, Ceramic Aroma Burners Assorted Wax Warmer Aromatherapy Tarts Holder Candle Scented Diffuser Home Bedroom… Directions Light a tea light in the burner. Add oil or wax to the ceramic bowl. Enjoy the aroma. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. Never leave burning candles unattended. See more
